result:
Here's a summary of all the changes I made to implement "mark as read when archiving":

## Changes Summary

### 1. `legacy/account/src/main/java/app/k9mail/legacy/account/Account.kt` (line 314-316)
- Added new synchronized property `isMarkMessageAsReadOnArchive` (defaults to `false`, but set to `true` in defaults and serialization)

### 2. `legacy/core/src/main/java/com/fsck/k9/AccountPreferenceSerializer.kt`
- **Load** (line 196): Added `isMarkMessageAsReadOnArchive = storage.getBoolean("$accountUuid.markMessageAsReadOnArchive", true)`
- **Save** (line 351): Added `editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.markMessageAsReadOnArchive", isMarkMessageAsReadOnArchive)`
- **Delete** (line 459): Added `editor.remove("$accountUuid.markMessageAsReadOnArchive")`
- **Defaults** (line 608): Added `isMarkMessageAsReadOnArchive = true`

### 3. `legacy/core/src/main/java/com/fsck/k9/preferences/Settings.java` (line 36)
- Incremented `VERSION` from 101 to 102

### 4. `legacy/core/src/main/java/com/fsck/k9/preferences/AccountSettingsDescriptions.java` (lines 127-129)
- Added setting descriptor: `markMessageAsReadOnArchive` at version 102 with default `true`

### 5. `legacy/ui/legacy/src/main/java/com/fsck/k9/ui/settings/account/AccountSettingsDataStore.kt`
- **getBoolean** (line 30): Added `"mark_message_as_read_on_archive" -> account.isMarkMessageAsReadOnArchive`
- **putBoolean** (line 56): Added `"mark_message_as_read_on_archive" -> account.isMarkMessageAsReadOnArchive = value`

### 6. `legacy/core/src/main/java/com/fsck/k9/controller/MessagingController.java`
- **Lines 1757-1761**: Removed the `MOVE_AND_MARK_AS_READ` exception throw; updated move capability check to also accept `MOVE_AND_MARK_AS_READ`
- **Lines 1815-1818**: After local move, if operation is `MOVE_AND_MARK_AS_READ`, sets `Flag.SEEN` on destination messages in local store

### 7. `legacy/core/src/main/java/com/fsck/k9/controller/ArchiveOperations.kt` (lines 72-76)
- Changed from always using `MoveOrCopyFlavor.MOVE` to conditionally using `MOVE_AND_MARK_AS_READ` when `account.isMarkMessageAsReadOnArchive` is `true`

### 8. `legacy/ui/legacy/src/main/res/xml/account_settings.xml` (lines 110-114)
- Added `CheckBoxPreference` for `mark_message_as_read_on_archive`

### 9. `legacy/ui/legacy/src/main/res/values/strings.xml`
- Added label and summary strings for the new archive setting

The implementation follows the exact same pattern as the existing `isMarkMessageAsReadOnDelete` feature. When enabled (default: `true`), archiving a message will both move it to the archive folder and mark it as read, both locally and on the remote server via the `MOVE_AND_MARK_AS_READ` pending command.
